data.body: P5 advisory remediation: the {romp-swath-wince, self-waltz-ace} applier.py pair is serialized via a depends_on edge. The {rancid-vane-wreak, veiny-trout-brink} workflow_ops.py pair is NOT edged because a task->story sibling depends_on promotes degenerately (rebar lifts the task to the epic, creating an epic->child self-dependency). That pair is instead serialized by (a) next-batch's file_impact-based conflict-aware scheduling and (b) the Sequencing section in this epic's description.
